privileged_info_summary: I have verified that all metadata matches the synthetically generated Calligra Words document created by setup_task.sh. All expected text contents, headers, labels, and output paths align perfectly with the script. However, I discovered a critical defect in verifier.py: it includes an anti-gaming check that sets the total score to 0 if the document's word count is less than 1500 words. Because the cleanly generated synthetic document is only 871 words in length, any unmodified or correctly formatted document will fail this check and strictly yield a score of 0, rendering the task impossible to pass.
